description_long: This is a rectangular, upright cardboard carrier box with a natural brown color and a die-cut handle at the top for easy carrying. The front face features three circular ventilation holes and bold, playful black text reading 'Emotional Support Rock' alongside a simple geometric graphic. The box has a flat base and sharply angled sides that taper toward the top, converging at the handle. The material appears to be corrugated cardboard, giving it a sturdy yet lightweight structure. The overall design is utilitarian but whimsical, suggesting it is meant for carrying a novelty or lightweight item. The box is closed, with no visible contents inside.
description: A brown cardboard carrier box with a die-cut handle, ventilation holes, and 'Emotional Support Rock' text printed on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the three ventilation holes, 'Emotional Support Rock' text, and the die-cut handle at the top.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain, angled side panels and the box's tapered shape toward the handle.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, with the same ventilation holes and printed text visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side, showing the plain, angled panel and the box's structure.
attribute_branding_or_logo: Printed text 'Emotional Support Rock' with a geometric graphic on the front.
